name: ono-project-inspector
description: Inspects an existing software repository and gradually builds a structured AI knowledge base for it (CLAUDE.md, AUDIT.md, and per-topic audit documents). Never modifies source code. First plugin in the Ono internal AI Marketplace.

extensibility.note: New inspector skills are added by (1) placing the skill under skills/<id>/, (2) adding one entry to skills/registry.json, and (3) optionally adding a hooks/after-<id>.md checkpoint file. No changes to plugin.json, agents/project-inspector.md, commands/inspect.md, or existing hooks are required.
